title: Balanced Paranthesis
hints: Use a stack to keep track of opening brackets.
When you encounter an opening bracket '(', '[', or '{', push it onto the stack.
When you encounter a closing bracket ')', ']', or '}', check if the stack is empty or if the top doesn't match.
If the stack is empty when encountering a closing bracket, return 0 (not balanced).
If the top of the stack matches the closing bracket, pop it. Otherwise, return 0.
After processing all characters, if the stack is empty, return 1 (balanced), otherwise return 0.
